title: Die Nibelungen, Teil 1 - Siegfried
writer: Harald G. Petersson, Harald Reinl, Ladislas Fodor
actors: Uwe Beyer, Rolf Henniger, Siegfried Wischnewski
plot: Volker von Alzey, the royal bard of the Burgunds (far greater then modern Burgundy), ruled by the Christian, papist king Gunther, who has two brave, loyal brothers and a sister Kriemhild, tells in rhyme the tale of Siegfried of Xa...
